title: dracontomelon lamujo
intro: Dracontomelon lamujo, a species of plant commonly known as the Lamujo tree, is a tropical plant native to the Philippines that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The medicinal properties of Dracontomelon lamujo lie in its bark, which is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and aid in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Dracontomelon lamujo can be made by boiling the bark in water or combining it with other herbs to create a tea or tincture that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
